plugins.name: XLM Paymaster React
plugins.author: xlm-paymaster-community
plugins.description: React hooks and context provider for XLM Paymaster fee sponsorship. Provides useFeeBump, useFluidClient, and useTransactionStatus hooks with built-in loading and error states.

plugins.name: XLM Paymaster Vue
plugins.author: stellarbuilder
plugins.description: Vue 3 composables for XLM Paymaster. Drop-in useFeeBump and useFluidClient composables with Pinia store integration and automatic retry on fee errors.

plugins.name: paymaster-py
plugins.author: soroban-labs
plugins.description: Python client for the XLM Paymaster fee sponsorship API. Fully async with httpx, supports batch fee bumps, and ships with a Django middleware for per-request sponsorship.

plugins.name: paymaster-go
plugins.author: xlm-go
plugins.description: Idiomatic Go client library for XLM Paymaster. Thread-safe, uses context.Context for cancellation, and integrates with the official Stellar Go SDK for XDR building.

plugins.name: Soroban Fee Adapter
plugins.author: soroban-labs
plugins.description: Wraps Soroban contract invocations with automatic XLM Paymaster fee bumps. Intercepts simulation results, builds the inner XDR, and requests sponsorship transparently.

plugins.name: XLM Paymaster Svelte
plugins.author: svelte-stellar
plugins.description: Svelte stores and actions for XLM Paymaster. Reactive feeBumpStore and createFluidAction with SvelteKit server-side fee bumping support.

plugins.name: xlm-paymaster-rs
plugins.author: stellar-rs
plugins.description: Rust async client for XLM Paymaster built on tokio + reqwest. Zero unsafe, strongly typed XDR, and compatible with the stellar-xdr crate for building fee-bump transactions.

plugins.name: XLM Paymaster Next.js
plugins.author: xlm-paymaster-community
plugins.description: Next.js App Router integration with server actions and route handlers for XLM Paymaster. Auto-signs fee-bump requests server-side so API keys never reach the client.

plugins.name: FluidKt
plugins.author: android-stellar
plugins.description: Kotlin/JVM client for Android and backend apps. Coroutines-first, supports both OkHttp and Ktor engines, and ships with a Retrofit adapter for existing API clients.

plugins.name: Freighter × XLM Paymaster Bridge
plugins.author: wallet-connect-stellar
plugins.description: Bridges Freighter wallet signing with XLM Paymaster fee sponsorship in one call. Sign with Freighter, bump fees with XLM Paymaster, and submit—all with a single signAndSponsor() helper.
